content.full_text:
3 March 1992

Ernest A. Scott  
11218 Crippen Avenue #4  
Adelanto, California 92301

Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 "J" Street,  
Sacramento, California 95814

Gentlemen:

May I have the benefit of your review of the enclosed campaign solicitation that appears to be circulating in our city and environs.

I would appreciate your review as to propriety and form of the solicitation taking into mind the obvious inferences that accompany the 'message'.

It is my understanding that any request for campaign contributions must be accompanied by a campaign identification number, and I see nothing that represents such a requirement nor do we see this on campaign literature. Of course, at the risk of being facetious, this is the same individual that in his capacity as Mayor of this town, he 'forgot' that his driver's license expired three years ago while driving his personal City owned Lincoln Town Car - and 'forgot' that the checks written to the city for cashing was on a closed account.

It is suggested here that further information will be furnished to your office as our little political campaign continues to April 14, 1992.

Very truly yours,

[signature]

Ernest A. Scott  
Candidate for Councilman, City of Adelanto, California  
Campaign No. #920177
